architecture_note: RueBaRue uses a Master Home Guide (shared template) + per-property macro values. The guide content for each property is the master guide with property-specific substitutions.

properties.note: Per-property guides use the Master Home Guide template with property-specific macro substitution ([PropertyId], [PropertyAddress], [WifiSecurityKey], etc.)
